steps.t: Constable Wren is at the guard-house, east of Combe. Maida Woodwright has asked that you speak with Constable Wren regarding the whereabouts of her so…
Covell may be found at one of the Blackwold camps north and east of the Combe lumber camp. Maida Woodwright sent you to speak with Constable Wren, who…
Constable Wren patrols near the guard-house on the hill south of the lumber camp and east of Combe. You discovered Covell Woodwright on the path leadi…
Maida Woodwright is back in Combe. Maida Woodwright must be told that her son Covell has joined the Blackwold brigands.
